creator: agh@riseup.net
text: I updated my working copy to 1.5.2, and switched to building the assets from downloading/using what is in the tarball, this restored game play, however, it requires a new external build dependency, archivers/smpq(https://reviews.freebsd.org/D44335). It may be possible to move to more external libraries too, and I will continue working on that.
